About

Enterprise IT leadership
at scale.

15 years of enterprise IT leadership across Asia Pacific and the Middle East. I bridge the gap between complex infrastructure and business outcomes — managing multi-entity operations, building vendor relationships that hold, and delivering projects on time and within budget.

Currently leading IT operations, procurement and project management across 5+ entities of the group — covering infrastructure, security, cloud, and end-user services across diverse business verticals.

My track record spans some of the region's most demanding IT environments, including a decade at AXA Insurance Gulf where I architected and delivered critical infrastructure transformations alongside CISO and CIO leadership.

Insurance Financial Services Enterprise IT Asia Pacific Middle East
GITEX · AI Everything 2025
Expertise

Four domains.
Deep capability.

☁

Cloud & Infrastructure

End-to-end design and management of hybrid cloud and on-premise infrastructure. VMware environments at scale, Citrix farms, hyper-converged platforms, and multi-cloud architectures across AWS and Azure.

AWS · Azure · VMware (~50 ESXi) · Citrix (1,000+ users) · Dell VxRail · Hyper-V · Data Centre
⚿

Security & Compliance

Endpoint protection, encryption, and compliance roadmaps delivered with CISO and CIO teams. Security architecture for enterprise environments spanning thousands of endpoints and regulatory obligations.

Symantec SEP · PGP Encryption · CompTIA Security+ · ITIL V3 · JNCIA · ISO alignment
⊞

Microsoft Ecosystem

Full-stack Microsoft delivery — Exchange migrations to O365, Active Directory architecture, SCCM/Intune fleet management, and Azure AD integration across large enterprises.

O365 · Exchange · Active Directory · Azure AD · SCCM · Intune · AirWatch MDM
⏻

Backup & Disaster Recovery

Enterprise backup infrastructure at scale — 120TB+ monthly offsite data, multi-platform management, and disaster recovery exercises across critical business systems.

Veeam · Veritas NetBackup · Druva · HP DP · Backup Exec · Iron Mountain · DR Planning

Consulting

Three areas where
I take on consulting work.

Microsoft Office 365

Migration planning and execution, tenant-level architecture, governance frameworks, Exchange transitions, and licence optimisation for organisations moving to or maturing within the M365 ecosystem.

Get in touch →

Backup Strategy & Implementation

End-to-end backup architecture design, vendor selection (Veeam, Veritas, Druva), DR planning, offsite data management, and compliance-aligned data protection for enterprise environments.

Get in touch →

IT Infrastructure Migrations

Cloud migrations, on-premise consolidations, platform refreshes, and hybrid infrastructure transitions — delivered on time and within budget, with minimal business disruption.
